\begin{figure}[htbp]
  \centering
  \includegraphics[width=0.9\linewidth]{FIGURES/ch04_wave_stability.pdf}
  \caption[Wave-train stability (autocorrelation at lag-1-period) versus wave frequency for 4 probes, 98 wave runs]{
    Wave-train stability (autocorrelation at lag-1-period) versus wave frequency for 4 probes, 98 wave runs. Colour = wind condition; linestyle = wave amplitude. Error bars: standard deviation across repeated runs at the same (frequency, amplitude). Dashed line: quality threshold 0.85 — runs below this are dominated by wind-wave noise at the IN probe.
  }
  \label{fig:ch04_wave_stability}
\end{figure}
